archetypes.name: CLI Command
archetypes.description: CLI command handlers and subcommand implementations.

analysisHints.description: CLI command modules handle user-facing terminal commands

archetypes.name: Component
archetypes.description: React/UI component files with JSX-returning functions.

analysisHints.description: Components have inflated call counts from hooks, state setters, and JSX rendering
High fan-in expected — config modules are widely imported

archetypes.name: Entry Point
archetypes.description: Module entry points, public APIs, and CLI entry files where uncalled exports are expected.

analysisHints.description: Uncalled exports are expected in entry points

archetypes.name: Gateway
archetypes.description: Re-export-heavy gateway modules that concentrate cross-package imports.

analysisHints.description: Gateway modules are expected to re-export heavily

archetypes.name: Hook
archetypes.description: React hooks — custom hooks encapsulating reusable stateful logic.

analysisHints.description: React hooks follow the use* naming convention

archetypes.name: Model
archetypes.description: Data models, schemas, and ORM definitions.

archetypes.name: Page
archetypes.description: Page-level components, views, or screens — top-level UI entry points for routes.

analysisHints.description: Page/view components orchestrate many sub-components and have inflated call counts

archetypes.name: Route Handler
archetypes.description: Server-side HTTP route handlers (Express, Hono, Koa, etc.).

archetypes.name: Route Module
archetypes.description: Framework convention route modules (Remix/React Router) with loader/action/default exports.

analysisHints.description: Convention exports are expected in route modules

archetypes.name: Schema
archetypes.description: Runtime validation schemas and data shape definitions (Zod, Yup, Joi, etc.).

analysisHints.description: Schema modules define runtime data shapes for validation

archetypes.name: Service
archetypes.description: Service layer modules — API clients, data fetching, and business logic orchestration.

analysisHints.description: Service modules orchestrate business logic and external calls

archetypes.name: Store
archetypes.description: State management stores and slices where high fan-in is expected.

analysisHints.description: High fan-in is expected for state management modules

archetypes.name: Types & Constants
archetypes.description: Type definitions, constants, and enums — companion files, not logic.

analysisHints.description: Unidirectional coupling and high fan-in expected for type files

archetypes.name: Utility
archetypes.description: Shared utility, helper, and infrastructure modules where high fan-in is expected.

analysisHints.description: High fan-in is expected for utility modules

evidence.detail: Top-level orchestration entry point that spawns CLIs for analysis pipeline and PRD health validation — no library imports, matches orchestration-tier pattern.
Business logic for configuring Claude Code integration — writes MCP server config, skills, and tool permissions; pure side-effectful setup service.
Shared CLI formatting utilities (help navigation, Levenshtein typo correction, ANSI color) used across orchestration scripts.
Pure analysis functions that examine RunRecord history to derive workflow optimization insights — no I/O or side effects.
Review-mode gate with interactive I/O (readline), diff collection, and approval flow — orchestrates a multi-step process.
Pure spin-detection functions identifying text-only LLM response patterns — no state or side effects.
Pure stuck-task detection by counting consecutive failures — no I/O or side effects.
Pure aggregation of ToolCallRecords into structured run summaries — no I/O.
Pure workflow analysis over RunRecord arrays to identify bottlenecks and failure patterns.
Backward-compatibility re-export shim — uncalled re-exports expected, matches entrypoint re-export pattern.
Agent execution loop for CLI provider — spawns subprocess, manages I/O, captures token usage, handles retries.
Periodic background timer writing heartbeat timestamps to disk — simple interval-based utility with no business logic.
Primary agent loop using Anthropic SDK — manages API calls, tool dispatch, token tracking, and run lifecycle.
Shared lifecycle coordination for both API and CLI loops — brief assembly, dry-run handling, task status transitions, run finalization.
Simple display formatting for task info (ID, title, priority, parent chain) before agent work begins.
Pure token budget validation — checks cumulative token usage against configured limit.
Token usage parsing and cross-provider normalization — re-exports from llm-client with Codex adapter mapping.
Task brief assembly service — collects task data, parent chain, acceptance criteria, and project metadata via rex-gateway.
System prompt construction service — builds context-aware prompts from project metadata and execution mode.
Backward-compatibility re-export shim for tool definitions — uncalled re-exports expected.
CLI help definitions for hench commands — usage patterns, flags, and examples for each subcommand.
Three-tier command hazard validation (shell operators, allowlist, dangerous patterns) — pure security guard functions.
Type definitions and config contracts for the guard layer — no logic, pure type/interface declarations.
Filesystem path validation (null-byte, directory traversal, glob blocklist) — pure security guard functions.
Stateful session-aware policy engine tracking cumulative command counts, bytes written, and operation frequency with audit trail.
Explicit re-export gateway concentrating all cross-package imports from rex — matches CLAUDE.md gateway pattern exactly.
Stateful metrics store with ring buffers tracking process counts and memory utilization — aggregates state for dashboard consumption.
Backward-compatibility re-export shim for execShell — delegates to new location.
Re-export adapter bridging llm-client process execution helpers to hench consumers under a familiar import path.
Process lifecycle validation service — orphan detection, resource monitoring, lock file management, audit trail.
Concurrency/rate limiting infrastructure shared across the process layer
Throttling logic based on memory pressure — shared utility
Tracks per-process memory usage — infrastructure utility
Manages stateful execution queue — business logic orchestration
Priority-based scheduling logic — business logic orchestration
Type definitions and interfaces for tool contracts — no logic
Routes and dispatches tool calls — business logic orchestration
Rex integration tool implementation — API client/data fetching
Test execution helper used as a hench tool
Validates task completion state — shared utility
API-based LLM provider implementation — API client
CLI-based LLM provider — data fetching/client logic
Factory function for constructing LLM clients
Core LLM client — primary API client and business logic
Type definitions for LLM interfaces — no runtime logic
Pure constants file exporting PROJECT_DIRS with directory name strings, no logic.
Defines vendor-agnostic LLMProvider interface, type aliases, and capability enums — pure type/contract definitions.
ProviderRegistry class manages dynamic provider registration and selection with factory pattern and singleton defaultRegistry.
ProviderSession manages active LLM provider lifecycle with vendor switching and instance reuse.
Pure Levenshtein-based typo correction utilities (editDistance, suggestCommands) with no side effects.
Utility functions parsing token usage from SDK and CLI output formats into a shared TokenUsage type.
Finding acknowledgment store with SHA256 hashing, JSON file persistence, and CRUD-like operations.
Shared constants, types, and helper functions extracted to break circular dependencies between analyze modules.
Post-processing orchestration that checks task count thresholds and triggers LLM re-consolidation.
LoE-threshold-driven recursive task decomposition pipeline using LLM calls.
Character-bigram similarity scoring and deduplication utilities used across analyze pipeline.
Pure utility that formats human-readable diffs between proposals and existing PRD items.
Four-phase extraction pipeline that parses documents and builds hierarchical proposal structures.
File format validation with magic-byte detection, size limits, and encoding checks.
Interactive multi-turn LLM clarification loop orchestrating Q&A to generate proposals.
Module-level LLM config singleton and client factory; holds mutable _llmConfig/_llmClient state.
LLM-powered pipeline that takes proposals + natural-language request and returns revised proposals.
Core proposal type definitions (ProposalTask, ProposalFeature, Proposal) and metadata types — no logic.
Primary LLM reasoning engine for PRD proposal generation; also re-exports from analyze-shared and llm-bridge for backward compatibility.
Fuzzy-matches proposals against existing PRD items using similarity scoring to detect duplicates and update candidates.
LLM-powered reasoning pipeline that generates merge/update/move/delete reshape proposals.
Multi-source discovery that scans tests, docs, sourcevision output, and package.json to produce ScanResults.
Pure validation and intent-classification functions for natural-language modification requests.
Defines per-command help text (COMMAND_DEFS) and exports getCommandHelp/getHelp for the rex CLI.
MCP tool handler implementations — each handler encapsulates business logic for a single MCP tool call.
MCP server factory (createRexMcpServer) that registers all tool handlers and wires transport — analogous to a route registrar.
Centralized CLI flag parsing and validation helpers with consistent error messaging.
Conflict detection service that checks intra-batch and existing-item similarity before PRD creation.
Atomic PRD item creation pipeline with DAG validation, hierarchy checks, and conflict detection.
Pure constant (DEFAULT_WORKFLOW string) with no logic — a configuration/content definition file.
Exports BUILTIN_ARCHETYPES constant array with archetype definitions — pure data/type definitions, no logic.
Pure heuristic classifier functions with no I/O or side effects — shared utility logic.
Reads .rex/prd.json from disk and git history to collect PRD items — data-fetching service layer.
Pure filter functions for branch lifecycle metadata — stateless utility helpers.
Persistent JSON storage with Zod schema validation for branch work records — state management store.
Generates architectural findings from call graph data — business logic orchestration.
Call graph analyzer using TypeScript compiler API — complex analysis service.
File classification engine matching files against archetype catalog — analysis service with business logic.
LLM API client bridge using @n-dx/llm-client — API client/service layer.
Reads and extracts completion state from .rex/prd.json — data-fetching service.
Component and route analyzer via AST pass over JSX/TSX files — analysis service.
CONTEXT.md generator producing structured summaries — document generation service.
Tracks zone metrics across analysis runs and produces delta reports — stateful analysis service.
Batch processing with retry logic for AI enrichment — API orchestration service.
Configuration constants and helpers for AI enrichment passes — pure config module.
JSON parsing and extraction utilities for AI responses — stateless parsing helpers.
Per-zone AI enrichment with parallelization — analysis service layer.
Orchestrates enrichment pipeline, delegating to sub-modules and re-exporting key functions.
Import graph analyzer using TypeScript compiler API — deterministic analysis service.
File inventory analyzer computing metadata, roles, and hashes — analysis service.
Generates llms.txt structured Markdown summary — document generation service.
Louvain community detection graph algorithm — pure algorithmic utility with high reuse potential.
Reads and writes .sourcevision/manifest.json with git info and version tracking — file management service.
File-move recommendation engine with detection strategies — business logic service.
Derives prioritized next steps from analysis findings — business logic orchestration.
Pure risk metric computation for zones — stateless scoring utility.
Detects server-side API routes from AST/annotations — stateless detection utility.
Token usage tracking helpers with factory and accumulator functions — shared utility.
Workspace aggregation engine merging multiple repo outputs — complex orchestration service.
Pure cross-repo crossing computation for workspace aggregation — stateless utility function.
Orchestrates sub-analysis detection and zone promotion across nested packages — complex business logic, not a simple utility.
Single exported function for crypto-hashing zone content; pure stateless helper with no side effects.
Writes per-zone markdown and JSON output files to disk; encapsulates I/O orchestration with multiple exported functions.
Core zone analysis engine running Louvain community detection, metric computation, and AI enrichment — primary business logic module.
Defines COMMAND_DEFS catalog and exposes showCommandHelp — CLI-layer help infrastructure.
MCP server factory and startup entry point invoked from the CLI command layer.
CLI command handler for 'sourcevision serve'; delegates via spawn with no local logic.
Generates multi-section PDF reports using PDFKit; orchestrates rendering and health score computation.
Pure functions that transform work records into PR markdown — stateless, no I/O, high reuse potential.
Shared merge/dedup/circular-detection helpers for inventory and import chunks.
20+ canonical deterministic sorting functions used across the entire package for stable output.
esbuild bundling pipeline configuration and build orchestration script.
Dev server orchestration script — spawns watchers and server; configuration-level infrastructure.
Vanilla JS interactivity module (animations, theme toggle, scroll effects) initialized once on page load — no framework, no JSX.
AggregationResultCache class with filesystem fingerprint-based invalidation — stateful caching service.
ConcurrentExecutionMetrics class tracking process counts and memory via ring-buffer snapshots — stateful metrics service.
Single re-export of createSourcevisionMcpServer — explicit web→sourcevision import gateway with no logic.
IncrementalTaskUsageAggregator class with change detection and per-file contribution tracking — stateful aggregation service.
Port availability detection helpers with retry logic — stateless utility functions.
Error classification and diagnostic builder functions — pure transformation logic with no side effects.
Thin sync wrappers around PRD file I/O (load/save/exists) shared across route handlers.
ProcessMemoryTracker class with ring-buffer sampling and leak detection — stateful per-process monitoring service.
Scheduler registration facade that wires usage cleanup and WebSocket broadcast — service wiring module.
40+ re-exports from rex package — centralized web→rex import gateway with no logic, enforcing DAG boundary.
Express route handlers for /analyze, /proposals, /smart-add — HTTP endpoint dispatch with request/response handling.
Express route handlers for epic orchestration with in-memory state machine for pause/resume.
Express route handlers for health score and reorganization proposal endpoints.
Express CRUD route handlers for PRD items (add, get, patch, delete, bulk, merge).
Express route handlers for pruning completed subtrees with archive management.
HTTP route handlers for read-only PRD endpoints like /api/rex/prd and /api/rex/stats
HTTP route handlers for CRUD operations on item requirements and traceability matrix
Shared helper/adapter functions used across rex route handlers, not a route handler itself
In-memory search index service with fuzzy matching and relevance scoring over PRD items
Cross-zone type definitions and constants to break dependency cycles — no logic
HTTP server entry point that creates the server and wires all routes
Public facade re-exporting incremental aggregation and scheduler registration — service orchestration layer
Periodic background service that identifies and prunes orphaned usage records
WebSocket server handling real-time PRD updates and file change events
Constants for sourcevision output file paths — pure constants, no logic
IntersectionObserver-based DOM node culling utility for large tree lists
Generic request deduplication wrapper — shared infrastructure utility
Application bootstrap that initializes the viewer — top-level startup orchestration
Physics engine (Barnes-Hut quad-tree, forces) for force-directed graph layout
Imperative SVG rendering engine with LOD and physics integration — not a React component
Data loader that fetches and validates sourcevision JSON files with lazy loading
Rate limiter with queue deduplication for API call throttling
Composed fetch wrapper combining request dedup and rate limiting
Batches rapid WebSocket messages into single flush — messaging infrastructure utility
Per-type trailing-edge debounce for WebSocket messages — messaging infrastructure utility
Composed factory combining throttle and coalescer for WebSocket message processing
Memory crash detection and navigation state recovery via sessionStorage
Tracks DOM node counts, render timing, and memory — performance monitoring utility
Gates state updates during tab inactivity — performance infrastructure utility
Progressive feature disabling as memory pressure rises — performance infrastructure utility
Real-time memory tracking with heuristic fallback — monitoring utility
Memory-aware refresh interval and concurrency scheduling utility
Suspends WebSocket pipeline during tab inactivity — performance gate utility
RAF-based UI state change batcher — performance infrastructure utility
Batches elapsed-time tick updates into single RAF frame — polling infrastructure utility
Centralized polling registry with interval management and tab visibility integration — stateful service with no framework dependencies
Coordinator that bridges memory-pressure graceful-degradation to polling-state suspend/resume — orchestration logic with no UI
Central registry for all polling sources with suspend/resume/dispose lifecycle — shared mutable state with high fan-in
Singleton wrapper around the Page Visibility API providing a single source of truth for tab visibility state
Shared tick timer service managing a single setInterval distributed to subscribers — zero-framework service module
Bridges tab-visibility to tick-timer suspend/resume lifecycle — pure coordination logic
Schema version migration helpers — stateless transformation functions for backward compatibility
Shared viewer utilities (path helpers, re-exports) with high fan-in — explicitly described as a utility hub
Zone color palette constants and lookup helpers — pure data/constants with no logic
Flow-diagram data builders transforming zone/call/import data into edge/node arrays for visualization components
Metric classification helpers (meterClass) — stateless pure functions for visualization display logic
PR validation pipeline script — runs build checks and PRD validation as a CI gate, not a CLI command handler
Utility module exporting refreshSourcevisionDashboardArtifacts — imported by other orchestration scripts, not a standalone CLI
Exports buildRefreshPlan — translates refresh flags into a validated execution plan, pure utility logic
Snapshot/rollback utilities for sourcevision output files during refresh — pure file-management helpers
Server orchestration entry point for ndx start/web commands — handles start, stop, status subcommands with PID management
